name: PARKS AMERICA, INC
summary: PART I As used in this Annual Report on Form 10-K, references to the Company, we, our, Parks! America and similar terms refer to Parks! America, Inc. and its wholly owned subsidiaries. Our fiscal year ends on the Sunday closest to September 30.
